PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetIfStatementImpl(IF_STATEMENT)
    PsiElement(IF)('if')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetConditionalBranchImpl(CONDITIONAL_BRANCH)
      PsiPuppetExpressionCompImpl(EXPRESSION_COMP)
        PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('type')
          PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
            PsiElement(()('(')
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('include_build_tools')
            PsiElement())(')')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(==)('==')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''string'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('include_build_tools_real')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=)('=')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('str2bool')
            PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
              PsiElement(()('(')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('include_build_tools')
              PsiElement())(')')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
        PsiElement(})('}')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(ELSE)('else')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('include_build_tools_real')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=)('=')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('include_build_tools')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
